_huong_dan: Hang doi bai MONEY (bottom-funnel, nham tool co chuong trinh affiliate mo). Chay 'npm run ai:money' -> lay bai 'todo' dau tien, sinh bai draft, danh dau 'done'. Them de bai moi vao cuoi mang. ctaTool = slug trong affiliate-map.json (hien hop CTA cuoi bai).
